index.title: Mofetoleli oa Resource
index.description: Mofetoleli oa Resource o bula likopo tsa ho hula tse fetoletsoeng ka mochini bakeng sa lifaele tsa hau tsa lisebelisoa ka repo efe kapa efe, ka sebopeho sefe kapa sefe — se tsamaisoang ke Azure AI Translator.
index.socialTitle: Resource Translator — fetolela lifaele tsa lisebelisoa ka boiketsetso
index.badge: v3.0 — Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.headlineAccent: boitlamo bo bong le bo bong.
index.lede: Mofetoleli oa Resource o bula likopo tsa ho hula tse fetoletsoeng ka mochini bakeng sa lifaele tsa hau tsa lisebelisoa o sebelisa Azure AI Translator ka SDK ea semmuso — ha ho na lits'ebeletso tse ling, ke ts'ebetso feela.
index.builtForShipping: E hahiloe bakeng sa ho tsamaisa thepa
index.workflowTitle: Phetolelo e le ts'ebetso, eseng mosebetsi oa mosebetsi.
index.workflowBody: Lahlela ketso ho CI ea hau e teng, e supe ho Azure AI Translator, 'me u lumelle repo ea hau hore e bue puo e ngoe le e ngoe eo u e shebileng.

formats.title: Lifomate tse tšeletseng tsa lifaele
formats.body: Maeto a ho potoloha {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini} le {restext} tse nang le sebopeho se tsitsitseng sa byte.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Drop a {configPath} file for include globs, glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

glossary.title: Glossary-Aware
glossary.body: Notlela mabitso a lihlahisoa le mantsoe a sehlahisoa ka regex e bohlale ea moeli oa mantsoe e sebetsanang le {cpp}, {dotnet} le metsoalle.

dryRun.title: Ho Ho Ho + Soft-Fail
dryRun.body: Hlahloba liphetolelo ntle le ho ngola lifaele, kapa u hlahise phoso e 'ngoe le e' ngoe e le tlhokomeliso ha u ntse u pheta-pheta.

outputs.title: Lihlahisoa tsa PR
outputs.body: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails} le {hasNewTranslations} slot ka kotloloho ho theha-hula-kopo.

sdk.title: Official Azure SDK
sdk.body: E hahiloe ka {azureSdk} + {corePipeline} — liteko tse iketsang ho {statusCodes}, ha ho na HTTP e phutholohileng ka letsoho. {esbuild}-bundled, audit-clean.

workflowPreview.body: Liphiri tse tharo, mela e mene, 'me repo ea hau e na le lipuo tse ngata ho sutumelletsa ho latelang.

cta.title: Na u se u itokiselitse ho sebelisa Autopilot?
cta.body: Senotlolo se le seng sa mofetoleli oa Azure AI, faele e le 'ngoe ea ts'ebetso. Mofetoleli oa Resource o sebetsana le tse ling kaofela.

getting-started.title: Ho qala
getting-started.lede: Kenya faele ea ts'ebetso, e supe ho lifaele tsa hau tsa Azure AI Translator, 'me ketso e tla skena repo bakeng sa lifaele tsa mohloli oa mohloli le ho ntša banab'eso ba fetolelitsoeng.

provision.title: Provision an Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Theha mohloli oa Azure AI Translator ho portal ea Azure, ebe u boloka tse latelang e le liphiri tsa polokelo ea GitHub e le hore ts'ebetso e ka li bala:
provision.key: Senotlolo sa ho ngolisa bakeng sa sesebelisoa.
provision.endpoint: URL ea sebaka sa ho qetela

resource.title: Etsa file ea mohloli oa mohloli
resource.body: Lifaele tsa lisebelisoa li sebelisa kopano ea {namingConvention}. Ka mohlala, {sourceFile} ba {frFile}, {deFile}, joalo-joalo kamora ho matha.

output.title: Hlahloba tlhahiso
output.body: Hang ha ts'ebetso e felile, ketso e pepesa liphetho tse tharo tseo u ka li hokahanyang le tlhaloso ea PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails} le {hasNewTranslations}. E boetse e ngola kakaretso ea Markdown leqepheng la mosebetsi ka {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Mehato e latelang
nextSteps.configuration: Ho hlophisa liphoso tsa boemo ba repo ka {configPath}.
nextSteps.recipes: Sheba lipe tsa li-monorepos, li-glossaries tsa moetlo, le lihlopha tsa mofetoleli oa tloaelo.

configuration.title: Tlhophiso
configuration.lede: Express defaults hang in the repository config file and let every workflow inherit them. Liketso li lula li hlōla ha li fanoa ka bobeli.
configuration.intro: Tlosa tsela ka ho kenya {configPath} haeba u hloka sebaka se sa fetoheng.

fields.sourceLocale: Khutlela ho kenyelletso ea {sourceLocale} haeba e sa sebelisoe. E boetse e romelloa ho Mofetoleli joalo ka {fromLocale} e le hore likhoele tse khuts'oane ha li fumanoe ka boiketsetso.
fields.toLocales: Ebang ke letoto kapa khoele e arohaneng ea comma.
fields.includeExclude: Lipaterone tsa Glob tse hlahlojoang khahlano le litsela tse felletseng le tsa mosebetsi.
fields.glossary: Phetolelo ea morao-rao e fetisoa. Ho tseba moeli oa lentsoe (ho sebetsana le {cpp}, {dotnet}).
fields.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — your industry/domain knob (legal, medical, marketing tone, etc.). E rometsoe joalo ka {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Ho hloleha ho {plain}. Sebelisa {html} feela haeba boleng ba hau ba mohloli bo na le likotoana tsa 'nete tsa HTML.
fields.profanityAction: Mokhoa oa ho sebetsana le lipolelo tse sa tloaelehang liphetolelong tsa liphetolelo?
fields.profanityMarker: E na le moelelo feela ha {profanityAction} {marked}.
fields.allowFallback: Beha ho {false} ho hloleha phetolelo ha {categoryId} hau e se na ts'ebetso bakeng sa sebaka se shebiloeng ho fapana le ho khutlela mofuteng o akaretsang.
fields.apiVersion: Translator REST API version. Ho hloleha ho {version}.
fields.maxRetries: Liteko tse phahameng tsa ho leka hape ho likarabo tsa nakoana tsa HTTP ({statusCodes}). Ho hloleha ho {defaultRetries}. Kakaretso ea mehala ea HTTP ka kopo e {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Cap (MS) bakeng sa boroko bofe kapa bofe ba mokokotlo. Ho hloleha ho {defaultBackoff}. Hlooho ea {retryAfter} ea Azure e hlomphuoa hantle ha e le teng; ho seng joalo ho sebelisoa li-backoff tse sa tloaelehang, tse koahetsoeng ka boleng bona.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Ho hloleha ho {true}. Ha e le teng, li-tokens tse kang {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} le HTML li nkeloa sebaka ke li-tokens tsa sentinel pele li fetoleloa ebe li khutlisetsoa morao. Tima feela ha mohloli o na le li-literals tse bōpehileng joaloka placeholder.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Lipaterone tse eketsehileng tsa regex (ntle le li-delimiters) li ekelitsoe ho sete ea sebaka sa marang-rang, mohlala {angleToken} bakeng sa syntax ea letšoao la tloaelo. Li-regex tse sa sebetseng li hlokomolohuoa.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Lipaterone tsa Glob li bapisoa le linotlolo tsa boemo ba parser (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext key). Linotlolo tse lumellanang li tlosoa ho tsoa ho kopo ebe li feta ka boleng ba tsona ba mohloli bo bolokiloeng.

steps.actionInputs: Ketso e bala litlatsetso tse hlakileng ho tsoa ts'ebetsong ea mosebetsi.
steps.config: E kenya YAML config ho tloha {configPath}.
steps.precedence: Bakeng sa tšimo e 'ngoe le e' ngoe e arolelanoeng, kenyelletso e hlola; ho seng joalo, boleng ba YAML bo sebelisoa.
steps.validation: Litekanyetso tse kopaneng li netefalitsoe. Li-enums tse sa sebetseng (mohlala, {invalidEnum}) li etsa hore ketso e hlōlehe ka potlako ka molaetsa o hlakileng.

tone.heading: Tone le indasteri ka mantsoe a hlakileng
tone.body: Azure AI Translator v3 API ha e na konopo e le 'ngoe ea molumo. Li-setting tse peli li kopanya ho u fa boholo ba taolo e tšoanang:
tone.industryBody: sebelisa {categoryId} ho supa sehlopha sa Azure {customTranslatorLink} se koetlisitsoeng ka corpus ea hau — molao, tekheniki, bongaka, papatso, kapa eng kapa eng. Ena ke sesebelisoa se matla ka ho fetisisa sa molumo, lentsoe la lebitso le mantsoe.
tone.surfaceBody: Sebelisa {glossaryLink} ho notlela mabitso a lihlahisoa le mantsoe a sehlahisoa ka nepo, 'me u sebelise {profanityAction} ho hlakola mantsoe a litšila ha u shebile sebaka sa bamameli ba banyenyane.

inputs.title: Input & Outputs
inputs.lede: Tlhahiso e 'ngoe le e' ngoe e boetse e amoheloa faeleng ea boikhethelo ea repo config. Ha bobeli bo behiloe, ts'ebetso ea ts'ebetso e hlola.
inputs.configurationIntro: Sheba {configurationLink} bakeng sa schema ea YAML le taelo ea ho jara.

items.sourceLocale: Mohloli oa sebaka (mohlala, {en}) o sebelisetsoang ho fumana lifaele tsa lisebelisoa tse kang {sourceGlob}. E boetse e romelloa ho mofetoleli joalo ka {fromLocale}.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Fetisa ka {secrets}.

items.region: Sebaka sa mohloli oa mofetoleli (tlohela lisebelisoa tsa lefats'e).
items.toLocales: Libaka tseo u lokelang ho li fetolela E amohela JSON array ({jsonArray}) kapa litekanyetso tse arohaneng ka comma.
items.include: Lipaterone tsa glob tse arohaneng tsa Newline; Ke lifaele tse lumellanang feela tse fetolelitsoeng.
items.exclude: Lipaterone tsa glob tse arohaneng tsa Newline; Lifaele tse lumellanang li tlosoa (li sebelisoa ka mor'a ho kenyelletsa).
items.configPath: Tsela e eang faeleng ea config ea YAML (e amanang le motso oa sebaka sa mosebetsi).
items.dryRun: Ha {true}, tsamaisa liphetolelo 'me u ntše litlhaloso empa u se ke ua ngola lifaele.
items.failOnError: Ha {true}, liphoso tse sa lebelloang li hloleha ketso; Ha {false}, liphoso ke tlhokomeliso.

translatorInputs.heading: Lisebelisoa tsa kopo ea mofetoleli
translatorInputs.intro: Tsena li etsa 'mapa ka kotloloho ho Azure AI Translator v3 mekhahlelo ea lipotso E 'ngoe le e' ngoe ke ea boikhethelo; Liphoso tsa mofetoleli li sebetsa ha li sa sebelisoa.
translatorInputs.caption: Lisebelisoa tsa kopo ea mofetoleli

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — the industry/domain/tone knob. E romele E romele Joalo ka {categoryQuery}
items.textType: {plain} kapa {html}. Sebelisa {html} feela ha boleng ba hau ba lisebelisoa e le likotoana tsa 'nete tsa HTML.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked} kapa {deleted}. Laola hore na mantsoe a litšila a hlahisoa joang liphetolelong.
items.profanityMarker: {asterisk} kapa {tag}. E na le moelelo feela ha {profanityAction} {marked}.
items.allowFallback: Ha {false}, mofetoleli o khutlisetsa phoso ho fapana le ho khutlela tsamaisong e akaretsang haeba {categoryId} ea hau e se na ts'ebetso ea sebaka se shebiloeng.

resilienceInputs.heading: Ts'ireletso ea Ts'ireletso le Ts'ireletso ea Sebaka
resilienceInputs.intro: Lisebelisoa tsena li laola hore na ketso e itšoara joang ha Mofetoleli a fokotsa kopo ea hau le hore na e sireletsa li-tokens tsa placeholder joalo ka {mustache} kapa {indexZero} hore li se ke tsa senyeha nakong ea phetolelo.
resilienceInputs.caption: Ts'ireletso ea ts'ireletso le ts'ireletso ea sebaka

items.maxRetries: Liteko tse phahameng tsa ho leka hape ho likarabo tsa nakoana tsa HTTP ({statusCodes}). Palo e felletseng ea mehala ea HTTP ka kopo ke {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Cap (ka milliseconds) ka boroko bofe kapa bofe ba morao. Ketso e hlompha hlooho ea karabelo ea {retryAfter} ea Azure hantle ha e le teng; ho seng joalo e sebelisa jittered exponential backoff e koahetsoeng ka boleng bona.
items.protectPlaceholders: Ha {true} (default), li-placeholder tse kang {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} le HTML li nkeloa sebaka ke li-tokens tsa sentinel pele li fetoleloa ebe li khutlisetsoa morao. Tima feela ha mohloli oa hau o na le mongolo o bōpehileng joaloka sebaka o lokelang ho fetoleloa.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Li-regexes tse arohaneng tsa Newline (ntle le li-delimiters) li ekelitsoe ho sete ea placeholder e sa fetoheng, mohlala {angleToken} bakeng sa syntax ea letšoao la tloaelo.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Lipaterone tsa glob tse arohaneng tsa Newline li bapisoa le linotlolo tsa boemo ba parser (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext key). Linotlolo tse lumellanang li tlosoa ho tsoa ho kopo ea Mofetoleli ebe li fetisoa ka boleng ba tsona ba mohloli bo bolokiloeng.

items.summaryTitle: Kakaretso e khuts'oane ea PR-title-friendly, mohlala {summaryExample}.
items.summaryDetails: Markdown summary e loketseng 'mele oa PR kapa kakaretso ea mosebetsi.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} ha phetolelo e le 'ngoe kapa tse' maloa tse ncha li hlahisitsoe.

formats.title: Lifomate tsa faele
formats.lede: Lifomate tse tšeletseng tsa lisebelisoa tse potolohang. Ketso e bala faele e 'ngoe le e' ngoe ea mohloli-locale, e fetolela litekanyetso, 'me e ngola ngoan'abo rōna ka sebaka se shebiloeng.
formats.namingConvention: Lifaele tsohle li sebelisa kopano ea {namingConvention} ea mabitso.

resx.blurb: Lifaele tsa .NET tse thehiloeng ho XML. Fetolela mongolo o ka hare oa node e {dataValue} ka 'ngoe, ho boloka litlhaloso le metadata.

xliff.blurb: Litokomane tsa OASIS XLIFF 2.0. Fetolela {source} e 'ngoe le e' ngoe ebe o ngola sephetho ho {target} e tsamaellanang, ho beha {trgLang} bakeng sa sebaka.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object files. Fetolela {msgid} / {msgidPlural} e 'ngoe le e' ngoe ka mefuta ea {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural}.

json.blurb: Lifaele tsa JSON tse sa reroang. Lintho tse hlasetsoeng li bataletse ka delimiter ea {delimiter} bakeng sa phetolelo, ebe li khutlisetsoa hape ka tlhahiso. Linotlolo tse nang le matšoao ({dottedKey}) li bolokiloe ka verbatim.

ini.blurb: Lifaele tse bonolo tsa {keyValue} (Win32-style INI kapa config efe kapa efe e bataletseng). Lihlooho tsa likarolo le litlhaloso li bolokiloe.
ini.specLabel: Sebopeho sa faele ea INI ho Wikipedia

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI text resources — flat {keyValue} pairs used as a textual companion to {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Netefatso ea leeto la ho potoloha
roundTrip.body: Suite ea liteko e netefatsa ho potoloha ha byte bakeng sa lisebelisoa tse emelang sebopeho se seng le se seng. Haeba quirk ea fomate e roba ho potoloha ho codebase ea hau, ka kopo {issueLink} ka sampole e fokolang.

recipes.title: Lipe
recipes.lede: Mekhoa e tloaelehileng ea liphetolelo tsa thomello: li-monorepos, li-glossaries, lihlopha tsa moetlo, ho matha ho ommeng le taolo ea molumo.

pullRequest.heading: Bula kopo ea ho hula ka mor'a ho matha ka 'ngoe le e' ngoe

monorepo.heading: Monorepos: phetolelo ea scope ka sephutheloana

glossary.heading: Glossary bakeng sa mabitso a brand le mantsoe a sehlahisoa
glossary.body: Mantsoe a glossary a sebelisoa {after} phetolelo, ka hona tlhahiso e fetoletsoeng ka mochini e boloka letšoao leo u le ratang le ha mohlala o e fapanyetsana bakeng sa synonym.

customCategory.heading: Sehlopha sa mofetoleli oa tloaelo (indasteri / domain)
customCategory.body: Koetlisa sehlopha sa Azure {customTranslatorLink} ho corpus e nkang mantsoe le molumo oa hau oa indasteri (molao, bongaka, papatso, boenjiniere ba kahare, jj.) 'me u fetise ID ea eona ka {categoryId}. Ena ke molumo o matla ka ho fetisisa oa molumo o fanang ka Azure.

tone.heading: Taolo ea molumo + ho oela ka thata
tone.body: Kopanya mofetoleli oa moetlo {categoryId} le {profanityAction} le {allowFallbackFalse} ho qobella lentsoe le sa fetoheng le ho hloleha ts'ebetso haeba sehlopha se khethiloeng se se na ts'ebetso bakeng sa e 'ngoe ea libaka tseo u li shebileng.

dryRun.heading: Dry run pele o bula ts'ebetso ea ts'ebetso
dryRun.body: Ketso e ntse e fana ka liphetho tse khuts'oane le kakaretso ea mohato, empa ha ho na lifaele tse ngotsoeng. Kopanya le {failOnErrorFalse} ho hlahisa taba e 'ngoe le e' ngoe e le temoso ha u ntse u pheta-pheta.

faq.title: DBK
faq.lede: Likarabo tse potlakileng tsa lipotso tse hlahang khafetsa ha u nka khato.

azure.heading: Ketso e bua joang le Azure?
azure.body: Ka {azureSdkLink} SDK ea semmuso ea Microsoft, e behiloeng ho {corePipelineLink}. Seo se u fa liteko tse iketsang ho {statusCodes}, mefuta ea kopo le karabelo e thaepa, le ho sebetsana le hlooho ea netefatso mahala — ntho e ngoe le e ngoe e neng e le mohala oa {axios} ka letsoho. Sebaka sa ts'ebetso ea sechaba (litlatsetso, lihlahisoa, liphetho tsa faele) ha li fetohe.

tone.heading: Ke hobane'ng ha liphetolelo ka linako tse ling li sa sebetse kapa li sa sebetse?
tone.body: Phetolelo ea mochini ha e sebetse ka mokhoa o akaretsang. Likonopo tse tharo lia thusa: {glossaryLink} bakeng sa ho fetisa mantsoe a thata, {customTranslatorLink} bakeng sa mehlala e hlophisitsoeng hantle e koetlisitsoeng ka molumo oa hau le mantsoe, le {profanityAction} ho hlakola kapa ho folakha mantsoe a litšila.

duplicateFiles.heading: Nka qoba joang ho fetolela faele e tšoanang habeli?
duplicateFiles.body: Qala ts'ebetso ea ts'ebetso ho {paths} e lumellanang le lifaele tsa hau tsa mohloli feela, mohlala {sourceGlob}. Ketso e boetse e kenyelletsa filthara ea eona ea faele ea 'ngoe le {githubToken} ha e behiloe, e fokotsa mosebetsi ho lifaele tsa boitlamo ba morao-rao.

offline.heading: A na nka tsamaisa ts'ebetso ntle le marang-rang?
offline.body: Eseng hantle — Azure AI Translator ke boko ba nako ea ho matha. Empa o ka matha le {dryRunTrue} ho netefatsa parsing le config ntle le ho etsa likopo tsa HTTP tsa phetolelo.

node.heading: Ke mofuta ofe oa Node oo ketso e sebetsang ho eona?
node.body: V3 e matha ho GitHub Actions {nodeRuntime} runtime. JavaScript e kopantsoeng e lumellana le Node 20, 22 le 24, e leng seo CI e se lekang.

dist.heading: Li-{distDir} tse kopaneng li tsoa kae?
dist.body: Liketso tsa GitHub JS li romella JS ea tsona e hlophisitsoeng polokelong. Ts'ebetso ea {distBuild} e e aha bocha kamora ho kopanya ho {mainBranch} hore na e ka tsamaea, 'me {distCheck} e thibela li-PR tse neng li tla fumana tlhahiso e siiloeng ke nako.

formats.heading: Ho thoe'ng ka mefuta e meng ea lisebelisoa?
formats.body: Kajeno: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} haeba u hloka e 'ngoe — sebopeho sa parser se senyenyane (parse → 'mapa → sebelisa liphetolelo → sebopeho) mme menehelo e amoheleha.

translations.title: Liphetolelo
translations.lede: Leqephe lena le fetoleloa ke Resource Translator ka boeona, ka ho sutumelletsa ho ea holimo, puong e 'ngoe le e' ngoe eo Azure AI Translator e e tšehetsang.
translations.statusComplete: {translatedCount} hona joale e fetotsoe — e felletseng!
translations.statusPending: {translatedCount} hona joale e fetotsoe — {pendingCount} emetse {workflowName} e latelang.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Batla ka puo, khoutu kapa lebitso la matsoalloa ...
translations.noLocales: Ha ho na libaka tse lumellanang le filthara eo.

steps.source: Faele ea mohloli oa Senyesemane e lula {messagesPath}.
steps.workflow: Pushes that touch it kick off {workflowLink}, which runs {thisAction} against itself.
steps.fanOut: Ketso e ea sebakeng se seng le se seng se tšehelitsoeng ke mofetoleli oa Azure AI (e hlophisitsoeng ka {configPath}) mme e ngola ngoan'abo {messagesLocaleJson} ka sepheo se seng le se seng.
steps.pullRequest: Kopo ea ho hula e buloa ka liphetolelo tse ncha. Ho e kopanya ho hatisa leqephe lena hape ka likarete tse tlatsitsoeng.

translations.poweredBy: E tsamaisoa ke mofetoleli oa lisebelisoa le mofetoleli oa Azure AI.

contributing.title: Ho kenya letsoho
contributing.lede: Litlaleho tsa bug, likopo tsa likarolo le likopo tsa ho hula kaofela lia amoheleha. Ts'ebetso e nyane ka ho lekana hore e ka ba botsoalle ho bafani ba lekhetlo la pele.

steps.extension: Eketsa katoloso ea faele ho {translationFileSchemes} ka {finderFile}.
steps.tests: Write round-trip tests for parse → format and applyTranslations.

coverage.heading: Meeli ea ho koahela
coverage.body: Ts'ebetso ea ts'ireletso ea ts'ireletso ea ts'ireletso ea Khoutu e ncha e tlameha ho boloka lipolelo + mela e kaholimo ho 78% mme e sebetsa kaholimo ho 90%. Eketsa li-fixtures le liteko hammoho le phetoho ea hau.

docsSite.heading: Sebaka sa litokomane
docsSite.body: Foldara ea {docsDir} ke projeke ea Astro 6 + Tailwind v4. Matha {npmInstall} moo hanngoe, ebe {npmRunDev} bakeng sa ponelopele ea lehae. Ts'ebetso ea {pagesWorkflow} e romella li-docs ho GitHub Pages ho kopanyo e ngoe le e ngoe.

changelog.title: Phetoho ea Phetoho
changelog.lede: Kakaretso e phahameng ea litokomane. Phetoho ea canonical, e nang le matla e lula CHANGELOG.md polokelong.
changelog.fullRecord: Sheba {changelogLink} bakeng sa rekoto e felletseng.

releases.v302: {label} Likopo tsa mofetoleli joale li beha {apiVersion} ka terata bakeng sa {translate} le {languages}. Azure SDK e hlompha feela khetho ea mofuta oa API ea boemo ba moreki ha netefatso e fetisoa; ketso e netefatsa kopo ka lihlooho, ka hona khetho eo e ile ea lahloa ka khutso mme likopo li ile tsa fetoloa ho mofuta oa API oa ponelopele oo konteraka ea {translate} e hanneng 'mele ka HTTP 400 (khoutu ea phoso {code}). Ka mor'a moo, tokiso e qalile ho 3.0.1.
releases.v301: {label} 'Mele oa kopo ea {translate} joale ke JSON e se nang letho ea lintho tse {textItem} ho fapana le ntho ea {inputs} e phuthetsoeng, e lumellanang le konteraka ea v3.0 REST. Ka boeona sena ha sea ka sa khutlisa liphetolelo — bona 3.0.2.

items.newInputs: Lisebelisoa tse ncha: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, hammoho le likonopo tse tsoetseng pele tsa Mofetoleli {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker} le {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Mohloli oa sebaka joale o boetse o fetisetsoa ho Mofetoleli e le {fromLocale} ka hona likhoele tse khuts'oane ha li fumanoe ka boiketsetso.
items.resilience: {label} ka boiketsetso ho likarabo tsa nakoana tsa HTTP ({statusCodes}) tse hlomphang hlooho ea {retryAfter} ea Azure — e khutlela morao ha e le sieo. Tunable ka {maxRetries} le {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} li-tokens tse kang {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} le HTML li phuthetsoe ka li-sentinels pele li fetoleloa ebe li khutlisetsoa kamora moo, ka hona Mofetoleli o emisa ho senya li-placeholder tsa i18next / Mustache / Handlebars / .NET / printf. Toggle ka {protectPlaceholders}; Atolosa {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} e ncha ea ho kenya {noTranslatePatterns} e theola linotlolo tse lumellanang ho tsoa ho kopo ea Mofetoleli ka botlalo (e boloka boleng ba mohloli bakeng sa mabitso a mabitso, likhoutu tsa phoso, jj.). E bapisa lipaterone tsa glob khahlano le linotlolo tsa boemo ba parser (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext key). {issue}
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Sebaka sa Astro + Tailwind v4 docs se nang le liphetoho tsa pono le Khoutu ea Expressive.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA pass. Li-glyphs tsa logo li fetotsoe litseleng e le hore li se ke tsa hlola li hloleha ho fapana le li-gradient stops, konopo ea {backToTop} e phaphametseng e sebelisa {inert} ha e ntse e patiloe (ho e-na le toggle ea {ariaHidden} e ileng ea e siea e le tabbable), likarolo tse {formatsAstro} ha li sa thulana le li-ID tsa bona tsa sehlooho tse hlahisitsoeng ka boiketsetso , likarete tse tharo tsa sebaka joale li pepesa litšobotsi tsa {lang} tsa BCP-47 ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), mabitso a kopitsoang {documentation} a matšoao a marang-rang a arohaneng pakeng tsa sidebar le footer,  'me tafole e 'ngoe le e' ngoe ea data ho {inputs} / {configuration} e na le tlhaloso ea sebali sa skrini.
items.inlineCode: {label} Docs prose {codeElement} hona joale e roala sehlooho se futhumetseng / sa amber — se fapaneng le palette ea brand→accent e sebelisetsoang lihokela le lihlooho.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
